name: Andy Mack
bio: Andy Mack serves as the Mayor of Longview, the second-largest city in East Texas and the county seat of Gregg County. Longview operates under a council-manager form of government. Mack has been active in community development and business growth in the Longview area.
campaignPromises: Attract new businesses and jobs to Longview
Support Longview police and fire departments
Enhance quality of life and parks in Longview
